Container.Name: kryptic-api
Container.Overview: Kryptic API - FastAPI backend service for Kryptic apps.

Config.Name: User Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for user data. REQUIRED — data is lost without this mount.

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: Directory containing conf.json. Copy your conf.json into this folder on the host before first start.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: Timezone for the container (e.g. Europe/Kiev, America/New_York).

Config.Name: API Listen Port
Config.Description: Port uvicorn listens on inside the container. Must match the port mapping above.
